channel.title: Babylon Burning
channel.description: Babylon Burning specializes in reggae music, new and old - from the rocksteady of the late 60s, through the roots and rockers era of the 70s, to the foundation dancehall sounds of the early 80s, right up to the freshest releases from Jamaica and around the world.

item.title: tribute to Rupie Edwards
item.description: Paying respects to the late Jamaican singer and producer Rupie Edwards (1945-2026) with an hour of his music... plus new tunes from Hempress Sativa, Double Tiger, and Australia's own Jah Tung... and a killer new combination from Protoje & Masicka, placed with some similarly sounding productions from the late 80s and early 90s.
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: forward on to zion
item.description: Showcasing the new Protoje album "The Art of Acceptance"... some pointed lyrics from Robbie Ark on his new song "Forward On To Zion" from Spanish producer Roberto Sanchez... new tunes from Marcus Gad, Medisun, Angelica Mava and Dalwayne... some early 90s classics from the Penthouse label... and a tribute to the late Jamaican singer Ernie Smith.
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: love right, live right
item.description: Featuring some vintage 70s roots, before taking it to some 90s classics from the likes of Sizzla, Luciano and Mikey General... revisiting the Runner riddim on Builders music from 2004... and more from the new Protoje album "The Art of Acceptance".
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: hill and gully ride
item.description: Featuring the biggest new riddim in dancehall, "Hill and Gully Ride" from producer Di Genius, plus the original mento inspiration and Busy Signal's tune from 2014... new music from Runkus, Chronic Law, Jaz Elise, Capleton, Perfect Giddimani, Medisun, Imeru Tafari, Jah Izrehl, Ziggi Recado, Protoje & Pressure... revisiting the Promised Land riddim on Barry U Records from 1998... the original Junjo Lawes run on the Worries In The Dance riddim... and vintage classics from the late 60s to the early 80s.
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: in your hands
item.description: Featuring the new posthumous Akae Beka album "World Tap In", and new music from Runkus, Perfect Giddimani, Ka$e, Derajah, Taj Weekes, Queen Ifrica and more... plus classics from the early 70s to the 80s.
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: wake up and see
item.description: Paying respects to the late Jamaican singer Roland Burrell (1951-2026)... featuring new music from the likes of Hezron, Stephen Marley, Rik Jam, Chezidek, T.Natty, The Flying Vipers, Kamrum & Jesse Royal... revisiting the Break Away riddim from Chimney Records after 10 years... and the usual vintage classics from the late 60s to the early 80s.
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: Fuel The Frequency with Bellyas, Itations, Troublemekka & Sista Sara
item.description: A special PBS Radio Festival edition of Babylon Burning, featuring guest presenters Bellyas, Itations, Troublemekka and Sista Sara filling in for Jesse I. Fuel the frequency and become a member today!
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: don't give up
item.description: Featuring Samory I's new album "Revelation", more from the new Runkus album "Supernova", homegrown reggae music from Jah Tung & Rayjah45, and new tunes from Capleton, Ziggi Recado, Yaksta & Jah Izrehl. Plus riddim juggling on the Bad Road riddim from 1997, some 1980s Jammys productions, and the usual 70s classics.
item.author: Jesse I

item.title: Tribute to Stranger Cole
item.description: Paying respects to the late Stranger Cole (1942-2026), a legend of Jamaican music and a Melbourne favourite. Plus new music from Imeru Tafari, I Wayne, Yohan Marley, Ka$e, Samory I, Agent Sasco, Aza Lineage, Jesse Royal, Marcus Gad, Tanzie, Vybz Kartel... local releases from Fitzroy Lee and  Isaac Chambers & Dub Princess... some foundation dancehall classics by special request... and nuff more.
item.author: Jesse I
